_README: Annual Maui County residential sales volume + median price, from PUBLIC sources (Realtors Assoc. of Maui monthly/annual stats, Hawaii DBEDT, or Redfin Data Center county TSV). Fill verified figures here; commission_watch estimates the aggregate commission LOAD = units * median * conventional_rate. Rows marked illustrative=true are PLACEHOLDERS - replace with verified numbers before citing. Actual per-deal commission RATES are NOT public (MLS-proprietary); this estimates load at the documented conventional rate.
conventional_rate_note: ~5-6% total commission was the long-standing convention the NAR/Sitzer-Burnett antitrust case targeted; post Aug-17-2024 rule changes, rates are supposed to become negotiable/competitive.
